phase_name: Productize phase 0 (reframed after Phase 3 compute-bound finding)

last_result.hypothesis: scale model d=96 → 128 (autochat HYP11 sweet spot) on 72KB corpus, 30-min budget
last_result.reason: 1.46M params × 30-min budget = ~12 epochs, far less than the ~25 the smaller d=96 fit at the same budget. Chinchilla math: ~6 × N × D FLOPs needed, our compute is fixed, so adding params underfits proportionally. d=128 is wrong direction at our compute budget; d=96 is the sweet spot. Real bottleneck is COMPUTE, not capacity.

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-0 v2 Q&A long answers d=128
phase-0 v3 Q&A capped 40 chars d=96
